title: LogsQueryFilter
description: Filter criteria for log search queries

query.description: A Datadog log search query string to filter log events (e.g., service:web status:error)

indexes.description: List of log index names to search; if empty, all indexes are searched

from.description: The start of the time range for the search in ISO 8601 format or relative format (e.g., now-15m)

to.description: The end of the time range for the search in ISO 8601 format or relative format (e.g., now)
